data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to reschedule a single instance, but the linked use case does not provide any concrete evidence or API endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. The evidence only mentions the ability to move one cleaning to Thursday for that week, which does not explicitly confirm the requirement of rescheduling a single instance. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence or API endpoints provided to validate the ability to reschedule a single instance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
